name: Ambromobiliare S.p.A.
summary: Ambromobiliare S.p.A. provides financial advisory services for medium-sized companies in Italy and internationally. The company offers equity capital market services; and financial advisory services, such as mergers and acquisitions, JVs and partnerships, divestitures, demergers, and capital restructuring services, as well as ancillary services. It also provides structured finance services, such as debt management, financial and budget analysis, strategic sector positioning, determination of cash flows, and the preparation of information memorandum for complex loans, as well as mezzanine finance. Ambromobiliare S.p.A. is based in Milan, Italy.
